name: MacBook Pro Display Name
description: Candidate joins as generic device name — must identify via behavior

payload.text: Hello, welcome to the interview. Tell us about your background.
Thank you for having me. I have 4 years of experience in backend development. In my current role, I built a real-time analytics pipeline processing 2 million events per second.
How would you handle data consistency in a distributed system?
I would use a combination of eventual consistency with conflict-free replicated data types. At my last company, we implemented saga patterns for cross-service transactions.
